The '''Educational Corps''', also known as the '''EduCorps''', was a branch of the [[Jedi Service Corps/Legends|Jedi Service Corps]] that was made up of teachers, scholars, and archivists. Made up of ranking and non-ranking members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], it was the smallest branch of the Service Corps next to the [[Medical Corps/Legends|Medical Corps]].

==Overview==
Members of the EduCorps were assigned this work by the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] if they had failed to pass the [[Initiate Trials/Legends|Trials]] at the [[Jedi academy]]. Additionally, ranking members of the Order could also join the EduCorps; [[Lore Keeper]]s who wished to remain in the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]] would sometimes join this group of scholars.<ref name="TJP" />

The Educational Corps instructed its recruits in the ways of imparting knowledge, taught them not only to be effective instructors but also to show patience and compassion for their pupils. Above all, they needed to understand that one could not always rely on [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to reach one's goal. The idea of forcing somebody to learn something through the Force violated the basic doctrines of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. The EduCorps provided instruction to the disadvantaged on countless worlds across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Armed with the philosophy that knowledge of the universe and those who dwell in it increases one's understanding of life in the galaxy, these EduCorps scholars strove to learn all they could within the first few years of membership to prepare themselves to teach that knowledge to their future students.<ref name="TJP" />

After the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the EduCorps was dissolved and all its members were executed, or went into hiding. Decades later when the [[New Jedi Order|Order]] was rebuilt, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] opted not to reform the EduCorps in favor of incorporating the ideas of both groups into the mainstream Jedi Order.<ref name="TJP" />
